title: In situ protocol for embryos and juveniles of Convolutriloba longifissura
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This protocol is based on a in situ hybridization protocol used for embryos of the sea anemone  Nematostella vectensis  (Martindale et al. 2004).
steps_raw: This protocol is based on a in situ hybridization protocol used for embryos of the sea anemone  Nematostella vectensis  (Martindale et al. 2004).
